return_policy.title: Returns & Exchanges Policy
rules: Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.
Items must be unused, unwashed, and in original packaging with all tags attached.
To initiate a return, contact support with your order ID and reason for return.
Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after the returned item is received.
Exchange requests must be submitted within 14 days of delivery.
Non-returnable items: digital downloads, personalized products, perishable goods, and items marked Final Sale.
Return shipping is free for defective or incorrect items; for change-of-mind returns, the customer covers return shipping.

shipping.title: Shipping & Logistics
rules: Standard shipping: 5–7 business days. Express shipping: 2–3 business days. Same-day delivery available in select cities.
Free standard shipping on all orders over $50.
Orders are processed within 1–2 business days after payment is confirmed.
A tracking number is sent by email once the order ships.
International shipping is available to 30+ countries; duties and taxes are the buyer's responsibility.
For lost or significantly delayed packages, contact support with your order ID — we investigate within 48 hours.
Delivery to P.O. Boxes is supported via USPS only.

coupons.title: Coupons & Promotions
rules: Only one coupon code can be applied per order. Coupons cannot be stacked or combined.
Coupons expire on the date displayed and cannot be reactivated or extended after expiry.
Most coupons apply to regular-priced items only and are not valid on sale or clearance items.
Some coupons require a minimum order value as stated in the coupon terms.
Referral credits are valid for 90 days from the date issued.
Coupon discounts are applied before taxes and shipping fees.
Coupons have no cash value and cannot be transferred or resold.
